title: Caramelized Pepper Mediterranean Crumble
description: A crunchy, savory dish with a sweet twist, perfect for brunch. This low-calorie-friendly recipe features caramelized peppers and combines them with fresh herbs and spices in a crumbly topping.

ingredients.name: Greek Yogurt
ingredients.notes: Stir in a pinch of cayenne pepper for extra kick

instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat, add bell peppers and cook until tender (about 5 minutes). Season with salt.
Reduce the cooking down to low for an additional 10-15 minutes. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.
In another pan, sauté garlic until fragrant, then whisk in red wine vinegar; reduce by half.
Mix cooked peppers and reduced sauce together thoroughly. Add Greek yogurt and fresh herbs; mix well.
